briefdescription.para: This function is the ULPI PHY interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: is the callback reference passed from the interrupt handler, which in our case is a pointer to the driver instance.
is a bit mask indicating pending interrupts.

briefdescription.para: This main function starts the USB application.
This file contains PHY register access related example.

simplesect.para: This example only shows reading and writing to the ULPI PHY SCRATCH register.The user can access any other register as per their requirement.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a hvm 12/3/10 First release 5.6 pm 07/05/23 Removed powerpc support. 5.6 pm 07/05/23 Added support for system device-tree flow.
